title: Trump says U.S. has 'good news' on Iran, talks to continue over weekend
summary_full: President Trump tells reporters that the U.S. and Iran will jointly recover nuclear material after a deal is reached.
summary_public: President Trump tells reporters that the U.S. and Iran will jointly recover nuclear material after a deal is reached.

IR.label: neutral
